subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! The ocean of forgiveness hath surged at every moment through Thy grace upon the people of rebellion, and the winds of bounty have stirred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد ماج بحر الغفران فی کل آن بفضلک علی اهل العصیان و هاج اریاح الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @humility; meekness; lowliness
